name: Find Returns Undefined
description: Array.find() result used without undefined check. Returns undefined when no element matches the predicate.
smt2Template:
(declare-const match_found Int)
(declare-const result_accessed Int)
(assert (= match_found 0))
(assert (= result_accessed 1))
(check-sat)

teachingExample.explanation: find employee by ID returns undefined for terminated employees — property access crashes
teachingExample.smt2:
(declare-const employee_exists Int)
(declare-const accessed Int)
(assert (= employee_exists 0))
(assert (= accessed 1))
(check-sat)

smt2ProofTemplate:
(declare-const match_found Int)
; Guard: undefined check before access
(assert (not (= match_found 0)))
; Can result be undefined?
(assert (= match_found 0))
(check-sat)
; unsat → proven: undefined check guards find result
